name: orchestra-hq/triage-orchestra-pipeline
description: Diagnose a failed Orchestra pipeline, open a fix PR, validate it on a branch run, then present a human-readable triage summary and STOP for user approval before merging. Use this when the user wants to review the fix before it goes to main — not for fully automated fixes. Trigger on phrases like "triage my pipeline", "show me what's broken", "investigate but don't fix yet", "prepare a fix for review", or when the user explicitly wants a review gate before applying changes. Also trigger when the user describes a symptom in a downstream system ("dashboard looks wrong", "chart is stale", "dbt model has bad data") even if no pipeline error exists — the skill will trace the symptom upstream.
